script_text: नमस्ते Ramesh Kumar। मैं ABC finance की ओर से आपके loan खाते के संबंध में एक महत्वपूर्ण औपचारिक सूचना साझा कर रही हूँ। हमारी जानकारी के अनुसार इस खाते की मूल राशि 199999 थी और वर्तमान कुल बकाया राशि 1200 है। खाता संख्या LAN1234 पर लंबित भुगतान के बारे में पहले भी सूचित किया गया था, लेकिन स्थिति अभी तक सामान्य नहीं हुई है। कृपया इस सूचना को गंभीरता से लें और भुगतान अथवा पुनर्भुगतान विकल्प पर चर्चा के लिए तुरंत 18002568 पर संपर्क करें। समय पर प्रतिक्रिया देने से आगे की एस्केलेशन से बचने में मदद मिल सकती है। धन्यवाद।

script_text: Hello Ramesh Kumar. I am speaking on behalf of ABC Finance with an important formal update regarding your loan account. Our records show that the original account value was 120000 and your current outstanding balance is 38450. Despite earlier reminders, the overdue amount on account LAN12345 remains unresolved. Please treat this communication seriously and contact us immediately at 1800-555-999 to discuss payment or a suitable repayment arrangement. An early response may help avoid further account escalation. Thank you.

opening.headline: Ramesh Kumar, immediate attention required on your Loan Account

context.headline: Continued delay recorded in Loan Account
context.body: As per ABC Finance records, payment has not been received on time. Total outstanding has reached ₹38,450 and the situation now requires formal attention.

amounts.headline: Amount Summary
amounts.note: Please discuss payment or repayment options immediately.

action.headline: Contact Today
action.body: Ramesh Kumar, contact 1800-555-999 now to discuss resolution and repayment options.

closing.headline: A timely response can prevent further escalation
closing.body: ABC Finance is awaiting your prompt response.

script_text: Hello Ramesh Kumar. I am speaking on behalf of ABC Finance with an important formal update regarding your loan account. Our records show that the original account value was 120000 and your current outstanding balance is 38450. Despite earlier reminders, the overdue amount on account LAN12345 remains unresolved. Please treat this communication seriously and contact us immediately at 1800-555-999 to discuss payment or a suitable repayment arrangement. An early response may help avoid further account escalation. Thank you.
